title: Concatenation
description: A modpack with a creative technology aspect. Food, camaras, tools and quality of life aspects.
body:
# MAIN ASPECTS

Create - Steampunk with energy mainly useing steam or water powered. Train, planes, mining, cooking and decorations.

Camara(Exposure) - An extensive mod adding camara(s) with film and setting like shutter speed with attachments. There are pictures that you can find throughout the world for example in a:
<details><summary>Spoiler</summary>village</details>

Quailty of life - For example a map to help you find your way and set wavepoints.

Structures including - 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Create buildings with items from the mod like windmills(found in villages).

</details>


______________________________________________________
Note that there are items/mods that are not listed.
